historical_gates.a3_diagnostic_novelty: DIAGNOSTIC SURVIVAL VERDICT: DOES NOT SURVIVE -- PHASE B BLOCKED -- DIAGNOSTIC NOT NOVEL

b0_method_novelty.m1_residual_causal_utility_protection: PARTIAL -- INSUFFICIENT METHOD NOVELTY (not killed outright, not survives)
b0_method_novelty.overall: METHOD PIVOT VERDICT: BLOCKED -- NO NOVEL METHOD YET

b0_audit_verdict.m1_reassessment: Verdict upheld. Killed on three independent HIGH-overlap directions (ArborKV ablation-supervision pipeline, IntentKV residual architecture, ThinKV counterfactual-to-policy pipeline), each grounded in full-text-inspected quotes, not search snippets alone. Correctly not classified as fully KILLED (no single paper performs the exact composite operation) nor SURVIVES.
b0_audit_verdict.m2_reassessment: Verdict upheld, strongly grounded. Killed by directly quoted primitives: ForesightKV's MDP state literally defined as 'the current remaining KV cache at step t'; Neural GC's cache-state conditioning; R-KV's own pinned source rescoring at every compaction (locally audited, not a secondary claim).
b0_audit_verdict.m3_reassessment: Verdict upheld. Allocation machinery is prior art (ReasonAlloc, Ada-KV/LKV lineage); the only new element is a constraint metric, which the project's own predeclared standard (applied against its own N3 in A3) rules insufficient by itself. This is a self-consistency argument, not a literature-strength argument, and it holds regardless of any single paper's evidence tier.
b0_audit_verdict.reliance_on_search_snippets_only: Present but confined to corroborating, non-load-bearing entries (e.g. LKV, IndexMem, Locret marked search_summary_only in docs/method_novelty_matrix.json); none of the three verdicts depends solely on a snippet-tier source.
b0_audit_verdict.uncertainty_directionality: docs/B0_SEARCH_LOG.md's own 'Saturation status' section already argues every logged uncertainty could only add overlaps (worsen novelty), never remove an already-quoted overlap -- reviewed and endorsed, not merely repeated, in this session's audit.
b0_audit_verdict.conclusion: B0 remains scientifically valid. No verdict is reversed by this audit.

documentation_corrections.readme_md: Added a 'Current status (read this first)' section ahead of the original diagnostic framing; relabeled the original opening paragraphs 'Historical research question (original framing)'; no historical sentence removed or edited.
documentation_corrections.experiment_md: Added a top-of-file ARCHIVAL NOTICE banner stating this is the frozen historical protocol, A3 killed diagnostic novelty, B0 found no novel method, and no new run should follow this protocol without a separately approved redesign; no body content below the notice was edited.

research_question: At an operating point that first passes a predeclared natural-accuracy plausibility gate and a realized-compression gate, does a deployed reasoning KV compressor evict blocks that (1) it ranks safe to remove, (2) are actually removed, (3) have high counterfactual future utility under a controlled KV-only intervention, (4) are not identified by established cheap signals, (5) occur frequently enough to motivate a distinct algorithmic operation? ('unexplained causal false negatives')

candidate_operating_points.reason_not_preferred: small population (~30 problems/year), ~5x longer traces, does not fit the GPU-hour ceiling at the same sample size as A

candidate_operating_points.evidence_tier: search_summary_only for the R-KV-specific accuracy-vs-budget curve
candidate_operating_points.reason_not_preferred: no primary-source lossless-budget number for this exact model

selected_operating_point_blocker: CLAUDE.md Section 4 freezes the model as deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B ONLY for this repository's pipeline. Candidate A uses a different model. A dated CHANGELOG.md/CLAUDE.md amendment BEFORE any GPU run is required and is NOT performed by this document.
intervention_unit: fixed 128-token block, aligned to R-KV's own divide_length=128 compaction schedule
primary_metric: reference-token NLL increase over a fixed 48-token future horizon, comparing a single-block-present vs single-block-absent cache state relative to the real deployed R-KV cache at a sampled compaction event

accuracy_gate.definition: pilot_accuracy_plausible-style: R-KV natural accuracy on the 12-example calibration subset must not fall more than a predeclared ceiling (recommend reusing this repository's existing ~0.10-0.15 convention) below FullKV natural accuracy
accuracy_gate.claim_boundary: keeps the pilot off an absurd operating point only; never supports an 'accuracy preserving' or 'accuracy neutral' claim at this n, matching docs/EXPERIMENT.md Section 8/Section 11's existing discipline

compression_gate.definition: measured instantaneous_retention_ratio materially below 1.0 on a meaningful fraction of natural R-KV runs, reusing require_meaningful_compression machinery

eligibility_rules: both-conditions natural base answer correct (loosened relative to the frozen primary pipeline's both-correct rule, since accuracy is not this pilot's primary axis, but a wrong-answer trace is excluded from event sampling)
natural run did not hit the generation token cap
sampled compaction event is not the first or last event in its run
at least horizon=48 tokens remain in the natural run after the sampled event
shadow-FullKV replay passes a schema/identity check against the R-KV run it shadows
verdict: B0.5 VERDICT: READY FOR B1 DISCOVERY-HARNESS IMPLEMENTATION
verdict_scope: Authorizes only a later, user-requested, CPU-developed B1 discovery-harness implementation. Does NOT authorize GPU use, model inference, model/dataset download, or any method implementation.
blockers: CLAUDE.md model freeze (Section 4) names only DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B; Candidate A's model requires a separate dated CHANGELOG.md/CLAUDE.md amendment before any GPU run, not granted by this document.

The 'lossless' accuracy claim for Candidate A is the R-KV paper's own eval protocol, not yet reproduced in this repository's own batch-1 replay engine; the accuracy gate could still fail exactly as the retired GSM8K point did, and passing is not guaranteed by the published number alone.

GPU cost estimate is a planning estimate built on an assumed 3090-vs-A100 throughput ratio, not a measurement; the protocol's own stopping rule 3 requires empirical re-projection after the first example before continuing.
uncertainties: Exact source paper for the 32-token/stride-16 'counterfactual occlusion' methodology (docs/B0_5_SEARCH_LOG.md Section 4) not pinned down this session.
The 'R-KV improved from 37.20% to 42.60% on MATH500' snippet for a 7B backbone is search-summary-level only and not relied upon for any decision.
RTX 3090 BF16 throughput for an 8B dense model was estimated from general hardware-comparison knowledge, not a source specific to this exact model.
R-KV's monkeypatch compatibility with the exact DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B architecture variant (Candidate C) was not independently confirmed this session.
No systematic forward-citation-database sweep was run (same gap as B0's and A3's logs).
prohibited_claims: That causal false negatives exist (still an untested hypothesis).
That A1/A2 provide causal existence evidence (their operating point failed the accuracy gate).
That any method (M1/M2/M3 or otherwise) works, beats a baseline, or preserves accuracy.
That Candidate A's published 'lossless' point transfers to this repository's own replay engine without independent verification.
That this document's READY verdict authorizes GPU use, inference, or implementation of any kind beyond a CPU-developed B1 harness.
Any condition named by a retention percentage (Section 9 rule, unchanged).

superseded_by.reason: Direct inspection of the pinned R-KV source (third_party/R-KV @ 45eaa7d69d20b7388321f077020a610d9afb65bd) found two load-bearing assumptions above false: the 'intervention_unit' field below (a fixed 128-token block) does not exist as R-KV's eviction unit -- divide_length=128 is only a per-layer compaction cadence trigger, and eviction is decided independently per layer and per KV head over individual cache slots. The 'primary_metric'/eligibility_rules' shadow-FullKV KV-recovery claim is also false for any event beyond the run's first compaction, because a shadow-FullKV replay never experiences the eviction history the real R-KV run did. Both are repaired in docs/B0_5_PROTOCOL_REPAIR.md sections 4-7. The verdict and gate fields below are retained verbatim for provenance; they are superseded by b0_5_r_verdict and b0_5_r_exact_gates, not deleted.

b0_5_r_verdict: B0.5-R VERDICT: READY FOR B1A PREREQUISITE IMPLEMENTATION
b0_5_r_verdict_scope: Authorizes only B1A: CPU-side prerequisite implementation (MATH-500 symbolic-equivalence verifier, architecture-aware R-KV monkeypatch dispatch, decision/provenance schema, read-only pre-compaction instrumentation hook, CPU unit/integration tests). Does NOT authorize B1B, model inference, a GPU, Vast.ai, the 12-example pilot, or any method claim. A dated CLAUDE.md/CHANGELOG.md model-freeze amendment remains required before any GPU run of B1B/B2A/B2B and is not granted by this record.
b0_5_r_repaired_intervention_unit: (compaction_event_id, layer_index, kv_head_index, absolute_token_position, pre_compaction_storage_position) -- a single cache slot, never a contiguous 128-token block. See docs/B0_5_PROTOCOL_REPAIR.md section 4.
b0_5_r_repaired_kv_source: Read-only instrumentation hook capturing key_states/value_states immediately before R1KV.update_kv's gather (r1_kv.py line 82-179), not a shadow-FullKV replay. If unattachable at implementation time, the intervention is blocked for that run rather than substituted. See docs/B0_5_PROTOCOL_REPAIR.md section 6.

b0_5_r_repaired_intervention_design.primary: Design A -- equal-byte add-back, evicted-candidate population only; every intervention adds exactly +1 KV slot at one (layer_index, kv_head_index) pair
b0_5_r_repaired_intervention_design.secondary_never_pooled: Design C -- retained-only physical-removal ablation, retained-control population only; every intervention removes exactly -1 KV slot at one (layer_index, kv_head_index) pair, via tensor-slice removal, never zeroing
b0_5_r_repaired_intervention_design.sign_convention: u_state = NLL_mean(ref | state ABSENT) - NLL_mean(ref | state PRESENT); positive u means the block's presence helps prediction, for both populations

b0_5_r_exact_gates.2_realized_physical_compression: instantaneous_retention_ratio <= 0.70 on at least 9 of 12 natural R-KV runs
b0_5_r_exact_gates.3_min_eligible_events: at least 3 eligible events (per example) on at least 9 of 12 examples
b0_5_r_exact_gates.4_cap_hit_asymmetry: abs(cap_hit_rate_FullKV - cap_hit_rate_RKV) <= 0.20, both proportions out of 12
b0_5_r_exact_gates.5_intervention_capture_validity: exact shape/dtype/(layer,kv_head) identity match at hook capture, zero tolerance, per labeled slot
b0_5_r_exact_gates.6_replay_parity_error: reuses existing repo replay-determinism discipline; no new numeric tolerance introduced
b0_5_r_exact_gates.7_missing_failed_branch_handling: any failed slot marked valid_flag=false with non-null invalid_reason, excluded from statistics, always counted
b0_5_r_exact_gates.8_runtime_feasibility_B2A: projected wall-clock from B2A-measured throughput <= 4.00 GPU-hours, hard stop otherwise
b0_5_r_exact_gates.9_memory_feasibility_B2A: peak allocated CUDA memory <= 22 GiB AND all parameters device.type == cuda (no offload)
b0_5_r_exact_gates.10_discovery_pattern_rule_B2B: per population (never pooled): discovery-supporting iff every baseline signal has abs(Spearman rho) < 0.30 against u AND IQR(u) > 0.01 nats

b0_5_r_prerequisites_identified_not_impl: Architecture-aware R-KV monkeypatch dispatch: src/kvcot/generation/policies.py currently imports and calls only rkv.monkeypatch.replace_qwen2 unconditionally; loading Candidate A's Llama-8B checkpoint under this code would silently leave LlamaAttention/LlamaForCausalLM unpatched (stock FullKV-equivalent behavior, no compaction ever fires) while still being labeled rkv_b1024 -- a silent mislabeling defect, not a crash.

MATH-500 symbolic-equivalence verifier: src/kvcot/utils/answers.py normalizes numeric strings only; boxed content such as fractions or algebraic expressions is returned as opaque literal text with no equivalence checking.
b0_5_r_roadmap: B1A (CPU prerequisite implementation -- authorized by this record)
B2A (one-example GPU calibration, mandatory hard-stop gate -- not authorized)
C0 (fresh method design and novelty gate -- not authorized)
